title: Old Reborn
description: A nostalgic resource pack for Tech Reborn that restores the classic look of Minecraft 1.7.10 and earlier. Enjoy retro-styled machines, ores, and tools with faithfully recreated textures that bring back the old-school industrial feel.
body: A nostalgic resource pack for Tech Reborn that restores the classic look of Minecraft 1.7.10 and earlier. Enjoy retro-styled machines, ores, and tools with faithfully recreated textures that bring back the old-school industrial feel.
